src/test/java/org/acme/quickstart/Native.general_idea: Replace the deprecated SubstrateTest annotation with the modern NativeImageTest annotation for Quarkus native testing.
src/test/java/org/acme/quickstart/Native.why_exists: The SubstrateTest class/annotation was removed or deprecated in newer Quarkus versions, causing a compile error (class not found) if not replaced with NativeImageTest.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 11 features (e.g., var, modules, new APIs) will fail to compile if the compiler target remains at 1.8.
